item.title: Pipes Spill onto Freeway After Trailer Rolls Over
item.description: A highway turns hazardous as loose pipes scatter across lanes after a trailer overturns

media:content.media:title: Pipes Spill onto Freeway After Trailer Rolls Over
media:content.media:description: A highway turns hazardous as loose pipes scatter across lanes after a trailer overturns

item.title: Tow Truck Fail - When You Know Someone Cheaper
item.description: When cutting costs goes wrong, a botched tow attempt turns into a costly and chaotic failure

media:content.media:title: Tow Truck Fail - When You Know Someone Cheaper
media:content.media:description: When cutting costs goes wrong, a botched tow attempt turns into a costly and chaotic failure
